lgpd.title: LGPD Consent
lgpd.fileIdentified: The file {fileName} has been identified as a resume.
lgpd.legalBasis: According to the LGPD (Law 13.709/2018), processing candidate personal data requires a legal basis. By proceeding, you confirm that:
lgpd.consent1: The candidate authorized the use of the resume for this position
lgpd.consent2: The data will be used exclusively for screening
lgpd.consent3: The candidate can request deletion at any time
lgpd.retentionNote: The data will be processed by AI for screening and discarded after the retention period configured in company policies.

chat.helpResponse:
**What LIA can do:**

**Create jobs**
- Create jobs with automatic JD enrichment
- Generate WSI screening questions (CBI/Bloom/Dreyfus)
- Configure eligibility and publish

**Find candidates**
- Automatic sourcing (local/global/hybrid)
- Search by skills, experience, location
- Talent pools and lists

**Analyze**
- Pipeline health and bottlenecks
- Job analytics (funnel, speed, quality)
- Weekly/monthly reports

**Communicate**
- Schedule interviews (direct or self-scheduling)
- Send feedback (approval/rejection)
- Email and WhatsApp

**Shortcuts**
- @name — mention candidate or job
- /create job — start wizard
- /search — search candidates
- /pipeline — view pipeline
- /report — generate report
- Drag PDF — auto-detects CV or JD

kanban.reschedulePrompt: The recruiter wants to change the interview time for {name} scheduled for {date}. Ask for the new preferred date and time and confirm the rescheduling with the candidate.
kanban.cancelPrompt: The recruiter wants to cancel the interview for {name} scheduled for {date}. Ask which stage they want to move the candidate to (or keep in the same) and confirm the cancellation.
kanban.manageInterviewPrompt: The recruiter wants to manage the interview of {name} scheduled for {date}. Ask if they want to change the time (request new date/time) or cancel. If canceling, ask which stage they want to move the candidate to.
kanban.clickCVAnalysis: Click to see CV vs Job Analysis
kanban.clickBigFiveReport: Click to see full Big Five report
kanban.jobPublishedDesc: The job is active. Share the link below with candidates:
kanban.linkCopiedDesc: The link has been copied to clipboard.
kanban.copyFailedDesc: Select the link manually and copy.
kanban.liaAnalysisText: Candidate automatically evaluated by LIA based on experience criteria, skills and job profile fit. The screening considers factors such as professional history, academic background and declared technical skills.
kanban.testDetailsText: Technical evaluation through practical testing focused on the technical skills required for the position. Includes code analysis, problem solving and knowledge of specific tools.
kanban.proficiencyText: English proficiency assessment covering written comprehension, oral expression and technical vocabulary relevant to the position.
kanban.moveToNewStage: Move candidate to a new process stage
kanban.reasonPlaceholder: E.g.: Interview scheduled for next Tuesday...
kanban.howCanIHelp: How can I help you today?
kanban.candidatesSelectedCount: {count, plural, one {# candidate selected} other {# candidates selected}}
kanban.clickReplaceInstruction: Click "Replace" to swap the selected question
kanban.suggestionTech1: How do you structure a scalable Design System for multiple platforms?
kanban.suggestionTech2: Describe your experience with user research methods and how you apply them
kanban.suggestionTech3: How do you measure the ROI of UX initiatives in digital products?
kanban.suggestionTech4: What is your approach to responsive design and accessibility?
kanban.suggestionTech5: How do you collaborate with developers to ensure faithful design implementation?
kanban.suggestionSoft1: How do you handle tight deadlines and multiple simultaneous deliverables?
kanban.suggestionSoft2: Describe a team conflict situation you resolved successfully
kanban.suggestionSoft3: How do you stay updated with trends and technologies in the field?
kanban.suggestionSoft4: What was your biggest professional challenge and how did you overcome it?
kanban.suggestionSoft5: How do you prioritize multiple demands from different stakeholders?
kanban.questionUX1: Which research method would be most appropriate to validate the usability of an early-stage prototype?
kanban.questionUX1optA: A) A/B test with large sample
kanban.questionUX2: How would you prioritize features in an MVP using the effort vs impact matrix?
kanban.questionUX2optA: A) High impact and low effort first ✓
kanban.questionUX2optB: B) High effort and high impact first
kanban.questionUX2optC: C) Low effort regardless of impact
kanban.questionUX3: What is the fundamental difference between Design System and Style Guide?
kanban.questionUX3optA: A) There is no difference, they are synonyms
kanban.questionUX3optB: B) Design System includes components and patterns, Style Guide focuses on visual ✓
kanban.questionUX3optC: C) Style Guide is more complete than Design System
kanban.questionUX3optD: D) Design System is only for developers

invite.phoneScriptTemplate:
📞 CALL SCRIPT - LIA

[Start of call] "Hello, good morning/afternoon! I am LIA, virtual assistant of the recruitment team at [Company].

I am calling for {name} regarding the selection process for the position of {job}.

[If the person confirms identity]

Great to speak with you! I would like to conduct a quick screening, which takes approximately 15 to 20 minutes. Can I proceed now or would you prefer I call back at another time?

[If yes, proceed]

Perfect! Before we begin, I need to inform you that this conversation will be recorded for evaluation purposes, in accordance with our privacy policy. Do you agree to proceed?

[After confirmation]

Great! I will ask some questions about your experience and way of working. You can answer calmly, there is no right or wrong answer.

[Start screening questions]"
